task: Find the lowest-priced Student housing near Liverpool International College which has been priced between 100 to 300 pounds and has a private bathroom.
graderReasoning: The agent found and supported a qualifying lowest-priced option using archived Student.com pages after the live site was unavailable for UK listings. Evidence shows the Liverpool International College search results page lists properties near Liverpool International College, including Innovo House at 'From £115 /week' with 'Private Room £115' on the LIC results page. The Innovo House property page states it offers 'modern en-suite rooms and studios' and that 'Each room boasts a private en-suite,' confirming a private bathroom. This satisfies the user's constraints of near Liverpool International College, price between £100 and £300, and private bathroom. Although the agent also explored 2024 pages and other candidates, the supported answer of Innovo House at £115/week is backed by visible Student.com evidence and is the lowest qualifying option shown in the trajectory.
action_history: Opening Student.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.student.com/');
Opening Student.com again: const p2 = await openTab('https://www.student.com/uk');
